argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const username = '{{ username }}'.replace(/^@/, ''); try { let attempts = 0; let followBtn = null; let unfollowTestId = null; while (attempts < 20) { unfollowTestId = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-unfollow"]'); if (unfollowTestId) return { ok: true, message: 'Already following @' + username + '.' }; followBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (followBtn) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); attempts++; } if (!followBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find Follow button. Are you logged in?' }; followBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const verify = document.querySelector('[data-testid$="-unfollow"]'); if (verify) return { ok: true, message: 'Successfully followed @' + username + '.' }; return { ok: false, message: 'Follow action initiated but UI did not update.' }; } catch (e) { return { ok: false, message: String(e) }; } }
